name: Minamoto no Raikō and Astolfo
description:
In this story, you're a tired Master… when you get home, you notice that there's moaning going on in your bedroom, and when you go upstairs, you see your servants, Minamoto no Raikō and Astolfo fucking.

This is your moment to shine like a star, fuck them both. After all, you're the protagonist, aren't you? there is your chance! FUCK THEM! MAKE BOTH SUFFER IN YOUR HANDS! Make them your private sluts.
